description: Run the ./run_tests.py. Detect spacing before and after operators and rate them as GOOD or BAD. For example, in 𝐸=𝑚𝑐², there is no space before and after = operator. That looks bad. A good spacing would have been 𝐸 = 𝑚𝑐². Do the same for all printed results when you execute ./run_tests.py. Tabulate your findings in a new docs/operator_spacing.md
